correctAnswer: Si hubiera aceptado ese trabajo, estaría en París ahora.
quizQuestion:
Complete the mixed conditional: '{___}'
Meaning: If I had accepted that job, I would be in Paris now.
(past si-clause + present consequence)
sentenceTranslation: If I had accepted that job, I would be in Paris now.
grammarPointLabel: mixed conditional: si hubiera aceptado (past) + estaría (present consequence)
explanation: Si hubiera aceptado ese trabajo, estaría en París ahora. Mixed conditional: si + pluperfect subj (past: I didn't accept it) + conditional simple (present: I'm not in Paris). The key marker is 'ahora' (now) signaling a present state.
targetLanguageWord: Si hubiera aceptado ese trabajo, estaría en París ahora.

correctAnswer: Si hubiera nacido en España, hablaría español perfectamente.
quizQuestion:
Complete the mixed conditional: '{___}'
Meaning: If I had been born in Spain, I would speak Spanish perfectly.
(past birth + present ability)
sentenceTranslation: If I had been born in Spain, I would speak Spanish perfectly.
grammarPointLabel: mixed conditional: si hubiera nacido (past) + hablaría (present consequence)
explanation: Si hubiera nacido en España, hablaría español perfectamente. Mixed conditional: si + pluperfect subj (past counterfactual: I wasn't born there) + conditional simple (present ability: I would speak it). A classic mixed conditional with birth/origin.
targetLanguageWord: Si hubiera nacido en España, hablaría español perfectamente.
